title: Undopia 3D Sculk Shrieker
description: Gives the Sculk Shrieker a 3 dimensional model
body:
![undopia-3d-sculk-shrieker](https://i.imgur.com/lAdGMz5.png) # Undopia 3D Sculk Shrieker [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/undopia-3d-sculk-shrieker?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth&color=%231bd96a) ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/undopia-3d-sculk-shrieker) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1207512?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=CurseForge&color=%23f16436) ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/undopia-3d-sculk-shrieker) [![ko-fi](https://i.imgur.com/wv1uE4k.png)](https://ko-fi.com/undugt) Undopia 3D Sculk Shrieker enhances your Deep Dark experience by making the Sculk Shrieker 3 dimensional! (Warden Approved) ---
[![Undopia Patch Resource Pack](https://i.imgur.com/beZ50qS.png)](https://patch.undopia.net) This resource pack is part of the Undopia Patch family. It is made of these Undopia Patch Features ![BP1wjqg.png](https://i.imgur.com/BP1wjqg.png) If you want to customize any of these use the Undopia Patch Customizer.
